hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.html ]] && python3 -c "
import sys, re
try:
    h = open('$f').read()
    # Catch unclosed script/style tags left by bad edits
    opens = len(re.findall(r'<script[^>]*>', h))
    closes = len(re.findall(r'</script>', h))
    if opens != closes:
        print(f'WARN: {f}: {opens} <script> opens but {closes} closes')
        sys.exit(1)
except Exception as e:
    pass
" 2>/dev/null || true; } 2>/dev/null || true
